datasets.descriptor: Local Quarks implementation substrate for theorem-grounded transition traces.
datasets.loader_strategy: Parse orchestrator graph/coordinator contracts and generate canonical transition traces.
datasets.recovery_notes: Real substrate already available locally; validation must treat this as canonical implementation context.

datasets.descriptor: Counterexample generator and replay set for schema-pass/semantic-fail and weakened assumption tests.
datasets.loader_strategy: Generate from local trace substrate and serialize theorem-premise toggles as JSONL.
datasets.recovery_notes: Materialize during validation preflight; expected size 100-400 MB. Real substrate is local executable trace replay.

datasets.descriptor: Recovery-episode benchmark for reroute/backtrack boundedness and oscillation tests.
datasets.loader_strategy: Generate controlled uncertainty episodes with finite-B and unbounded-B toggles.
datasets.recovery_notes: Materialize in validation; expected size 150-500 MB.

datasets.descriptor: Failure-injection traces for branch explosion and non-oscillation falsification.
datasets.loader_strategy: Injection-driven synthetic extensions over real transition traces.
datasets.recovery_notes: Materialize during validation; expected size 100-300 MB.

datasets.descriptor: Protocol-level adversarial traces for HM-TH-03 guard evaluation.
datasets.loader_strategy: Compose attack templates over transition traces and label covered/uncovered classes.
datasets.recovery_notes: Optional external acquisition for comparator enrichment; expected pull size ~0.5-2 GB total. Must pin URL+commit, capture LICENSE, and store checksum manifest before full run.

candidate_sources.label: Local trace logs from Quarks substrate

datasets.descriptor: Trace-integrity audit dataset for append-only hash-link invariance checks.
datasets.loader_strategy: Derive hash chains from trace logs and inject controlled mutations for falsification tests.
datasets.recovery_notes: Materialize during validation; expected size 50-250 MB.
